                <fieldset>
                    <div class="row form-group">
                        <div class="col-lg-4">
                            <label>Müşteri ara (Ad) -1</label>
                            <input type="input" class="form-control search-product" onkeyup="customerSearch()" id="txt-customerSearch-New" placeholder="Müşteri ara (Ad, Soyad, İşletme)" aria-describedby="button-addon2" autocomplete="off">
                            <script>
                                function customerSearch() {
                                     var input, filter, table, tr, td, i, txtValue,selectvalue;
                                    input = document.getElementById("txt-customerSearch-New");
                                    filter = input.value.toUpperCase();
                                    table = document.getElementById("customerTbl");
                                    tr = table.getElementsByTagName("tr");

                                     for (i = 0; i < tr.length; i++) {
                                        td = tr[i].getElementsByTagName("td")[8];
                                        if (td) {
                                            txtValue = td.textContent || td.innerText;
                                           
                                            if (txtValue.toUpperCase().indexOf(filter) > -1) {
                                                tr[i].style.display = "";
                                                //alert(tr[i].textContent);
                                            } else {
                                                tr[i].style.display = "none";
                                            }
                                        }
                                    }
                                }
                            </script>
                        </div>
                        
                    </div>

                </fieldset>
 
            </div>

        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    $(document).ready(function () {
        $("#mainUserInformation").removeClass('d-none');
        FormSliderSwitcher.init();
        $("#business").prop('disabled', true);
    });

    /*******************************/
    function SelectIsletmeChange(id) {
        idN = $("#selectIsletme" + id).val();
        var isletmeadi = $("#selectIsletme" + id + " option:selected").html();
         if (isletmeadi.replace(" ","") === "Tümü") {
            return;
        }
        getIsletmeLisans(idN);

        $("#itemisletmeadi").html(isletmeadi);
        $("#exampleModalCenterDetay").modal("show");
        $('#tblmain').find('tr').each(function (i, tr) {
            var today = new Date();
            var dd = today.getDate();
            var mm = today.getMonth() + 1;
            var yyyy = today.getFullYear();
            var nextyyyy = today.getFullYear() + 1;
            if (dd < 10) {
                dd = '0' + dd;
            }
            if (mm < 10) {
                mm = '0' + mm;
            }
            //var today = yyyy + '-' + mm + '-' + dd;
            var nextYear = nextyyyy + '-' + mm + '-' + dd;

            today = dateFormat(today);
            //nextYear = dateFormat(nextyyyy);

            $(tr).children(i).eq(0).children().attr('value', today);
            $(tr).children(i).eq(1).children().attr('value', nextYear);
            $(tr).children(i).eq(2).children().attr('value', false);
            $(tr).children(i).eq(2).children().prop('checked', false);
            $(tr).children(i).eq(4).children().attr('value', "");

        });
        var valueSelected = this.value;
/*        $("#moduller").removeClass('d-none');*/
       // $("#mainuserInf").removeClass('active show');
       //  $("#mainuserInf").addClass('active show');
       // $("#nav-pills-tab-2").removeClass('active show');
      //  $("#addModul").addClass('active show');
       // $("#nav-pills-tab-1").addClass('active show');

        $('.switchery').prop('checked', true).trigger("click");
        $('.switchery').prop('checked', false).trigger("click");
        $.ajax({
            type: "Post",
            url: '/IsletmeModul/GetIsletmeModel',
            data: { _businessID: idN },
            success: function (model) {
                $('#tblmain').find('tr').each(function (i, tr) {
                    $.each(model, function (a, BusModel) {

                        if (BusModel.ModulID == $(tr).children(i).eq(3).data().id) {
                            var start = new Date(parseInt(BusModel.BaslangicTarihi.substr(6)));
                            var finish = new Date(parseInt(BusModel.BitisTarihi.substr(6)));
                            var startDate = dateFormat(start);
                            var finishDate = dateFormat(finish);
                            var number = BusModel.Number;
                            $(tr).children(i).eq(2).children().prop('checked', true).trigger("click");
                            $(tr).children(i).eq(0).children().attr('value', startDate);
                            $(tr).children(i).eq(1).children().attr('value', finishDate);
                            $(tr).children(i).eq(4).children().attr('value', number);
                        }
                    });
                });
                $("#divSaveButIsletmeStatus").html('<button type="button" id="btnSaveModuleKaydet" onclick="IsletmeStatuguncelle(' + idN + ','+id+');" class="btn btn-md btn-primary m-r-5">Kaydet</button>');
            },
            error: function (msg) {
                $.gritter.add({ title: "İşlem Hatalı", text: msg });
            }
        });

    }

    function deleteCustumers(id, name) {
        $.ajax({
            type: "Post",
            url: '/Login/deleteUser',
            data: { MainID: id },
            success: function (msg) {
                if (msg == "ok") {
                    $("#rowsName" + id).remove();
                    $.gritter.add({ title: name + " Silme Başarılı" });
                }
            }
        });
    }

     
    function getIsletmeLisans(id) {
        $.ajax({
            type: "Post",
            url: 'GetIsletmeLisans',
            data: { _businessID: id },
            success: function (model) {
                document.getElementById("bsBaslangic").valueAsDate = new Date(model.Start);
                document.getElementById("bsBbitis").valueAsDate = new Date(model.End);
                $("#slIsletmeId").val(model.ID);
             },
        });
    }
    function setIsletmeLisans() {
         $.ajax({
            type: "Post",
            url: 'SetIsletmeLisans',
             data: { _businessID: $("#slIsletmeId").val(), EndTime: $("#bsBbitis").val() },
             success: function (model) {
                 if (model=="OK") {
                     $("#exampleModalCenterDetay").modal("hide");
                 }
             },
        });
    }

   

    function updateCustomers(id) {

        var lisStarsDate = $("#txtStartDate" + id).val();
        var lisFinishDate = $("#txtFinishDate" + id).val();
        var userCount = $("#userCount" + id).val();
        var bussCount = $("#bussCount" + id).val();
        var lisType = $('#selectLicenseType' + id).val();
        var mainUserModel = {
            ID: id,
            LisansBaslangicTarihi: lisStarsDate,
            LisansBitisTarihi: lisFinishDate,
            KullaniciSayisi: userCount,
            IsletmeSayisi: bussCount,
            LisansTipi: lisType,
            Adres: Secims
        };
        $.ajax({
            type: "Post",
            url: '/IsletmeModul/updateMainUser',
            data: { model: mainUserModel },
            success: function (rdata) {
                $.gritter.add({ title: "İşlem Başarılı" });
                JData = [];
                JData = rdata;
            }
        });
    }

    function AdNoteCustomers(id) {
        $("#idnotes").val("");
        $.ajax({
            type: "Post",
            url: '/Filter/GetMainUserModel',
            data: { _mainUserID: id },
            success: function (model) {
                $("#exampleModalCenter").modal("show");
                var notes = model.KullaniciNotu;
                $("#idnotes").val(notes);
                $("#divUsers").html("<button type=\"button\" id=\"btnnotguncelle\" onclick=\"UpdateNotes(" + id + ")\"  class=\"btn btn-md btn-primary m-r-5\">Kaydet</button>")
            },
        });
    }

    function UpdateNotes(id) {
        var Notea = $("#idnotes").val();
        $.ajax({
            type: "Post",
            url: '/IsletmeModul/updateMainUserNote',
            data: { ID: id, Note: Notea},
            success: function () {
                $.gritter.add({ title: "İşlem Başarılı" });
                $("#exampleModalCenter").modal("hide");
            }
        });
    }

    /**************************************/


    function dateFormat(date) {
        //debugger;
        var dd = date.getDate();
        var mm = date.getMonth() + 1;
        var yyyy = date.getFullYear();
        if (dd < 10) {
            dd = '0' + dd;
        }
        if (mm < 10) {
            mm = '0' + mm;
        }
        return yyyy + '-' + mm + '-' + dd;
    }

    $(".form-check-input.is-valid").change(function () {
        if ($(this).prop("checked") == true) {
            $((this)).attr('value', true);
        } else {
            $((this)).attr('value', false);
        }
    });

    function IsletmeStatuguncelle(isletmeid, anakullaniciID) {
        var durum = true;
        $('#tblmain').find('tr').each(function (i, tr) {
            var startDate = $(tr).children(i).eq(0).children().val();
            var finishDate = $(tr).children(i).eq(1).children().val();
            var statu = $(tr).children(i).eq(2).children().is(":checked");
            var modul = $(tr).children(i).eq(3).data().id;
            var sayi = $(tr).children(i).eq(4).children().val();
            console.log(sayi);
            var IsChech = false;
            if (statu != "" && statu != "false") {
                IsChech = true;
            }
            var businessModulData = {
                BaslangicTarihi: startDate,
                BitisTarihi: finishDate,
                IsletmeID: isletmeid,
                AnaKullaniciID: anakullaniciID,
                Number: sayi,
                ModulID: modul
            };
            $.ajax({
                type: "Post",
                url: '/IsletmeModul/SaveBusinessModule',
                data: { modul: businessModulData, IsCheck: IsChech },
                success: function (data) {
                    if (data != "Success") {
                        durum = false;
                    }
                    else {
                    }
                },
                error: function (msg) {
                    $.gritter.add({ title: "İşlem Hatalı", text: data });
                }
            });
        });

        $("#exampleModalCenterDetay").modal("hide");

        if (durum == true) {
            $.gritter.add({ title: "İşlem Başarılı" });
        }
        else {
            $.gritter.add({ title: "İşlem Hatalı" });
        }

    }
</script>

    <div class="modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered" role="document">
        <div class="modal-content">
            <div class="modal-header">

                    <span aria-hidden="true">×</span>
                </button>
            </div>
 

            <div id="Notlar" class="form-group row">
                <div class="col-lg-12">

                        <input type="text" id="idnotes" class="form-control">
                    </div>
                     
                    <div id="divUsers" class="pt-2 pl-2">
 
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

        </div>

                <button type="button" class="close" data-dismiss="modal" aria-label="Close">
                    <span aria-hidden="true">×</span>
                </button>
            </div>


            <div id="Notlar" class="form-group row">
                <div class="col-lg-12">

                    <div id="moduller" class="form-group row ">
                        <div class="col-lg-12">
                            <table id="tblModuls" class="table table-bordered table-condensed table-td-valign-middle">
                                <thead>
                                    <tr>

                                        <td><input class="form-control" type="date" id="bsBaslangic"></td>

                                        <td class="d-none"><input id="slIsletmeId"></td>
                                        <td><a href="#!" onclick="setIsletmeLisans()" class="btn-update-bs btn btn-success btn-block">Güncelle</a></td>
                                        <td colspan="2"><label class="text-center">İşletme Lisans Bitiş Tarihi</label></td>
                                    </tr>
                                </thead>
                                <tbody id="tblmain">
                                    
                                        <tr>

<script>

    $('#txt-customerMailSearch').keyup(function () {

        var searchField = $(this).val();
        var tablo = "";
        $('#_mainUser').html('');
        if (searchField === '') {
            $.each(JData.AnaKullaniciListesi, function (key, item) {

                tablo += '<tr id="rowsName' + item.ID + '" class="ecommerce-card">';
                var isletmead = "";
                var miktar = 0;
                var isletmeler = "";
                $.each(JData.BusinessList, function (key, items) {
                    if ((items.AnaKullaniciID == item.ID)) {
                        if (miktar == 0) {
                            isletmead = items.Ad;
                        }
                        miktar++;
                        isletmeler += '<option value="' + items.ID + '">' + items.Ad + '  </option>';
                    }
                });
                tablo += '<td>' + item.Ad + ' ' + item.Soyad + ' <br> ' + isletmead + '</td>';

                var odenecekTutar = 0;
                var kullaniciFiyat = 0;
                var isletmeFiyat = 0;

                $.each(JData.FiyatModul, function (key, itemsa) {
                    if (itemsa.ID == 15) {
                        kullaniciFiyat = itemsa.Fiyat;
                    }
                    else if (itemsa.ID == 16) {
                        isletmeFiyat = itemsa.Fiyat;
                    }
                    else if (itemsa.ID == 17) {
                        odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + itemsa.Fiyat * itemsa.Number;
                    }
                });

                if (item.KullaniciSayisi > 5) {
                    kullaniciFiyat = kullaniciFiyat * item.KullaniciSayisi - kullaniciFiyat * 5
                    odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + kullaniciFiyat;
                }

                if (item.IsletmeSayisi > 1) {
                    isletmeFiyat = isletmeFiyat * item.IsletmeSayisi - isletmeFiyat * 1;
                    odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + isletmeFiyat;
                }

                $.each(JData.IsletmeModulFiyat, function (key, itemss) {
                    if ((itemss.AnaKullaniciID == item.ID)) {
                        odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + itemss.Fiyat;
                    }
                });

                tablo += '<td>₺' + ((odenecekTutar * 1.18) / 100).toFixed(2) + '</td>';

                tablo += '<td>';
                tablo += '<select id="selectLicenseType' + item.ID + '">';

                if (item.LisansTipi == "0") {
                    tablo += '<option selected value="0"> NEW  </option>';
                }
                else {
                    tablo += '<option  value="0"> NEW  </option>';
                }
                if (item.LisansTipi == "1") {
                    tablo += '<option selected value="1"> ONLINE  </option>';
                }
                else {
                    tablo += '<option  value="1"> ONLINE  </option>';
                }
                if (item.LisansTipi == "2") {
                    tablo += '<option selected value="2"> OFFLINE </option>';
                }
                else {
                    tablo += '<option value="2"> OFFLINE </option>';
                }
                if (item.LisansTipi == "3") {
                    tablo += '<option selected value="3"> DEMO </option>';
                }
                else {
                    tablo += '<option  value="3"> DEMO </option>';
                }
                if (item.LisansTipi == "4") {
                    tablo += '<option selected value="4"> BAYI </option>';
                }
                else {
                    tablo += '<option  value="4"> BAYI </option>';
                }

                tablo += '</select>';
                tablo += '</td>';

                var start = new Date(parseInt(item.LisansBaslangicTarihi.substr(6)));
                var finish = new Date(parseInt(item.LisansBitisTarihi.substr(6)));
                var startDate = dateFormat(start);
                var finishDate = dateFormat(finish);

                tablo += '<td><input id="txtStartDate' + item.ID + '" value="' + startDate + '" class="form-control" type="date"></td>';
                tablo += '<td><input id="txtFinishDate' + item.ID + '" value="' + finishDate + '" class="form-control" type="date"></td>';
                tablo += '<td><input type="text" id="userCount' + item.ID + '" class="form-control" value="' + item.KullaniciSayisi + '"></td>';
                tablo += '<td><input type="text" id="bussCount' + item.ID + '" class="form-control" value="' + item.IsletmeSayisi + '"></td>';

                tablo += '<td>';
                tablo += '<select id="selectIsletme' + item.ID + '" style="width:60px;" onchange="SelectIsletmeChange(' + item.ID + ');">';


                tablo += '<option value="0">Tümü </option>';

                tablo += isletmeler;

                tablo += '</select>';
                tablo += '</td>';

                tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap="">';
                tablo += '<a href="javascript:updateCustomers(' + item.ID + ');" id="userUpdate' + item.ID + '" dat-userid="' + item.ID + '" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">GÜNCELLE</a>';
                tablo += '</td>';
                tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap="">';
                tablo += '<a href="/Detail/Index?LID=' + item.ID + '" class="btn btn-sm btn-success">DETAY</a>';
                tablo += '</td>';
                tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap="">';
                tablo += '<a href="javascript:AdNoteCustomers(' + item.ID + ');" class="btn btn-sm btn-success">NOT</a>';
                tablo += '</td>';
                tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap=""><a href="javascript:deleteCustumers(\'' + item.ID + '\',\'' + item.Ad + " " + item.Soyad + '\');" id="userDelete' + item.ID + '" class="btn btn-sm btn-danger">SİL</a></td>';
                tablo += '</tr>';
            });
        }
        else
        {
            var regex = new RegExp(searchField, "i");
            var count = 1;

            $.each(JData.BusinessList, function (key, itemMain) {

                if ((itemMain.Ad.search(regex) != -1) || (itemMain.Email.search(regex) != -1)) {

                    $.each(JData.AnaKullaniciListesi, function (key, item) {

                        if ((itemMain.AnaKullaniciID == item.ID)) {

                            tablo += '<tr id="rowsName' + item.ID + '" class="ecommerce-card">';
                            var isletmead = "";
                            var miktar = 0;
                            var isletmeler = "";
                            $.each(JData.BusinessList, function (key, items) {
                                if ((items.AnaKullaniciID == item.ID)) {
                                    if (miktar == 0) {
                                        isletmead = items.Ad;
                                    }
                                    miktar++;
                                    isletmeler += '<option value="' + items.ID + '">' + items.Ad + '  </option>';
                                }
                            });

                            tablo += '<td>' + item.Ad + ' ' + item.Soyad + ' <br> ' + isletmead + '</td>';

                            var odenecekTutar = 0;
                            var kullaniciFiyat = 0;
                            var isletmeFiyat = 0;

                            $.each(JData.FiyatModul, function (key, itemsa) {
                                if (itemsa.ID == 15) {
                                    kullaniciFiyat = itemsa.Fiyat;
                                }
                                else if (itemsa.ID == 16) {
                                    isletmeFiyat = itemsa.Fiyat;
                                }
                                else if (itemsa.ID == 17) {
                                    odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + itemsa.Fiyat * itemsa.Number;
                                }
                            });

                            if (item.KullaniciSayisi > 5) {
                                kullaniciFiyat = kullaniciFiyat * item.KullaniciSayisi - kullaniciFiyat * 5
                                odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + kullaniciFiyat;
                            }

                            if (item.IsletmeSayisi > 1) {
                                isletmeFiyat = isletmeFiyat * item.IsletmeSayisi - isletmeFiyat * 1;
                                odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + isletmeFiyat;
                            }

                            $.each(JData.IsletmeModulFiyat, function (key, itemss) {
                                if ((itemss.AnaKullaniciID == item.ID)) {
                                    odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + itemss.Fiyat * itemsa.Number;
                                }
                            });

                            tablo += '<td>₺' + ((odenecekTutar * 1.18) / 100).toFixed(2) + '</td>';

                            tablo += '<td>';
                            tablo += '<select id="selectLicenseType' + item.ID + '">';

                            if (item.LisansTipi == "0") {
                                tablo += '<option selected value="0"> NEW  </option>';
                            }
                            else {
                                tablo += '<option  value="0"> NEW  </option>';
                            }
                            if (item.LisansTipi == "1") {
                                tablo += '<option selected value="1"> ONLINE  </option>';
                            }
                            else {
                                tablo += '<option  value="1"> ONLINE  </option>';
                            }
                            if (item.LisansTipi == "2") {
                                tablo += '<option selected value="2"> OFFLINE </option>';
                            }
                            else {
                                tablo += '<option value="2"> OFFLINE </option>';
                            }
                            if (item.LisansTipi == "3") {
                                tablo += '<option selected value="3"> DEMO </option>';
                            }
                            else {
                                tablo += '<option  value="3"> DEMO </option>';
                            }
                            if (item.LisansTipi == "4") {
                                tablo += '<option selected value="4"> BAYI </option>';
                            }
                            else {
                                tablo += '<option  value="4"> BAYI </option>';
                            }

                            tablo += '</select>';
                            tablo += '</td>';

                            var start = new Date(parseInt(item.LisansBaslangicTarihi.substr(6)));
                            var finish = new Date(parseInt(item.LisansBitisTarihi.substr(6)));
                            var startDate = dateFormat(start);
                            var finishDate = dateFormat(finish);

                            tablo += '<td><input id="txtStartDate' + item.ID + '" value="' + startDate + '" class="form-control" type="date"></td>';
                            tablo += '<td><input id="txtFinishDate' + item.ID + '" value="' + finishDate + '" class="form-control" type="date"></td>';
                            tablo += '<td><input type="text" id="userCount' + item.ID + '" class="form-control" value="' + item.KullaniciSayisi + '"></td>';
                            tablo += '<td><input type="text" id="bussCount' + item.ID + '" class="form-control" value="' + item.IsletmeSayisi + '"></td>';

                            tablo += '<td>';
                            tablo += '<select id="selectIsletme' + item.ID + '" style="width:60px;" onchange="SelectIsletmeChange(' + item.ID + ');">';


                            tablo += '<option value="0">Tümü </option>';

                            tablo += isletmeler;

                            tablo += '</select>';
                            tablo += '</td>';

                            tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap="">';
                            tablo += '<a href="javascript:updateCustomers(' + item.ID + ');" id="userUpdate' + item.ID + '" dat-userid="' + item.ID + '" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">GÜNCELLE</a>';
                            tablo += '</td>';
                            tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap="">';
                            tablo += '<a href="/Detail/Index?LID=' + item.ID + '" class="btn btn-sm btn-success">DETAY</a>';
                            tablo += '</td>';
                            tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap="">';
                            tablo += '<a href="javascript:AdNoteCustomers(' + item.ID + ');" class="btn btn-sm btn-success">NOT</a>';
                            tablo += '</td>';
                            tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap=""><a href="javascript:deleteCustumers(\'' + item.ID + '\',\'' + item.Ad + " " + item.Soyad + '\');" id="userDelete' + item.ID + '" class="btn btn-sm btn-danger">SİL</a></td>';
                            tablo += '</tr>';

                        }
                    });
                }
            });
        }

        $('#_mainUser').html(tablo);
        $('#_mainUser').simpleLoadMore({
            item: '.ecommerce-card',
            count: 12,
            counterInBtn: true,
            btnText: 'Daha Fazla {showing}/{total}',
        });

    $('#txt-customerSearch').keyup(function () {
        var searchField = $(this).val();
        var tablo = "";
        $('#_mainUser').html('');
        if (searchField === '') {
            $.each(JData.AnaKullaniciListesi, function (key, item) {

                tablo += '<tr id="rowsName' + item.ID + '" class="ecommerce-card">';
                var isletmead = "";
                var miktar = 0;
                var isletmeler = "";
                $.each(JData.BusinessList, function (key, items) {
                    if ((items.AnaKullaniciID == item.ID)) {
                        if (miktar == 0) {
                            isletmead = items.Ad;
                        }
                        miktar++;
                        isletmeler += '<option value="' + items.ID + '">' + items.Ad + '  </option>';
                    }
                });
                tablo += '<td>' + item.Ad + ' ' + item.Soyad + ' <br> ' + isletmead + '</td>';

                var odenecekTutar = 0;
                var kullaniciFiyat = 0;
                var isletmeFiyat = 0;

                $.each(JData.FiyatModul, function (key, itemsa) {
                    var nm = JData.FiyatModul.number;
                    if (itemsa.ID == 15) {
                        kullaniciFiyat = itemsa.Fiyat;
                    }
                    else if (itemsa.ID == 16) {
                        isletmeFiyat = itemsa.Fiyat;
                    }
                    else if (itemsa.ID == 17) {
                        odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + itemsa.Fiyat * nm;
                    }
                });

                if (item.KullaniciSayisi > 5) {
                    kullaniciFiyat = kullaniciFiyat * item.KullaniciSayisi - kullaniciFiyat * 5
                    odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + kullaniciFiyat;
                }

                if (item.IsletmeSayisi > 1) {
                    isletmeFiyat = isletmeFiyat * item.IsletmeSayisi - isletmeFiyat * 1;
                    odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + isletmeFiyat;
                }

                $.each(JData.IsletmeModul, function (key, itemss) {
                    var nm = JData.IsletmeModul.number;

                    if ((itemss.AnaKullaniciID == item.ID)) {
                        odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + itemss.Fiyat * nm;
                    } 
                });

                tablo += '<td>₺' + ((odenecekTutar * 1.18) / 100).toFixed(2) + '</td>';

                tablo += '<td>';
                tablo += '<select id="selectLicenseType' + item.ID + '">';

                if (item.LisansTipi == "0") {
                    tablo += '<option selected value="0"> NEW  </option>';
                }
                else {
                    tablo += '<option  value="0"> NEW  </option>';
                }
                if (item.LisansTipi == "1") {
                    tablo += '<option selected value="1"> ONLINE  </option>';
                }
                else {
                    tablo += '<option  value="1"> ONLINE  </option>';
                }
                if (item.LisansTipi == "2") {
                    tablo += '<option selected value="2"> OFFLINE </option>';
                }
                else {
                    tablo += '<option value="2"> OFFLINE </option>';
                }
                if (item.LisansTipi == "3") {
                    tablo += '<option selected value="3"> DEMO </option>';
                }
                else {
                    tablo += '<option  value="3"> DEMO </option>';
                }
                if (item.LisansTipi == "4") {
                    tablo += '<option selected value="4"> BAYI </option>';
                }
                else {
                    tablo += '<option  value="4"> BAYI </option>';
                }

                tablo += '</select>';
                tablo += '</td>';

                var start = new Date(parseInt(item.LisansBaslangicTarihi.substr(6)));
                var finish = new Date(parseInt(item.LisansBitisTarihi.substr(6)));
                var startDate = dateFormat(start);
                var finishDate = dateFormat(finish);

                tablo += '<td><input id="txtStartDate' + item.ID + '" value="' + startDate+'" class="form-control" type="date"></td>';
                tablo += '<td><input id="txtFinishDate' + item.ID + '" value="' + finishDate+'" class="form-control" type="date"></td>';
                tablo += '<td><input type="text" id="userCount' + item.ID + '" class="form-control" value="' + item.KullaniciSayisi+'"></td>';
                tablo += '<td><input type="text" id="bussCount' + item.ID + '" class="form-control" value="' + item.IsletmeSayisi+'"></td>';

                tablo += '<td>';
                tablo += '<select id="selectIsletme' + item.ID + '" style="width:60px;" onchange="SelectIsletmeChange(' + item.ID + ');">';


                tablo += '<option value="0">Tümü </option>';

                tablo += isletmeler;

                tablo += '</select>';
                tablo += '</td>';

                tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap="">';
                tablo += '<a href="javascript:updateCustomers(' + item.ID + ');" id="userUpdate' + item.ID + '" dat-userid="' + item.ID + '" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">GÜNCELLE</a>';
                tablo += '</td>';
                tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap="">';
                tablo += '<a href="/Detail/Index?LID=' + item.ID + '" class="btn btn-sm btn-success">DETAY</a>';
                tablo += '</td>';
                tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap="">';
                tablo += '<a href="javascript:AdNoteCustomers(' + item.ID + ');" class="btn btn-sm btn-success">NOT</a>';
                tablo += '</td>';
                tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap=""><a href="javascript:deleteCustumers(\'' + item.ID + '\',\'' + item.Ad + " " + item.Soyad + '\');" id="userDelete' + item.ID + '" class="btn btn-sm btn-danger">SİL</a></td>';
                tablo += '</tr>';
            });
        }
        else
        {
            var regex = new RegExp(searchField, "i");
            var count = 1;
            $.each(JData.AnaKullaniciListesi, function (key, item) {
                if ((item.Ad.search(regex) != -1) || (item.Soyad.search(regex) != -1) || (item.Soyad.search(regex) != -1)) {

                    tablo += '<tr id="rowsName' + item.ID + '" class="ecommerce-card">';
                    var isletmead = "";
                    var miktar = 0;
                    var isletmeler = "";
                    $.each(JData.BusinessList, function (key, items) {
                        if ((items.AnaKullaniciID == item.ID)) {
                            if (miktar == 0) {
                                isletmead = items.Ad;
                            }
                            miktar++;
                            isletmeler += '<option value="' + items.ID + '">' + items.Ad + '  </option>';
                        }
                    });
                    tablo += '<td>' + item.Ad + ' ' + item.Soyad + ' <br> ' + isletmead + '</td>';

                    var odenecekTutar = 0;
                    var kullaniciFiyat = 0;
                    var isletmeFiyat = 0;

                    $.each(JData.FiyatModul, function (key, itemsa) {
                        if (itemsa.ID == 15) {
                            kullaniciFiyat = itemsa.Fiyat;
                        }
                        else if (itemsa.ID == 16) {
                            isletmeFiyat = itemsa.Fiyat;
                        }
                        else if (itemsa.ID == 17) {
                            odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + itemsa.Fiyat * itemsa.Number;
                        }
                    });

                    if (item.KullaniciSayisi > 5) {
                        kullaniciFiyat = kullaniciFiyat * item.KullaniciSayisi - kullaniciFiyat * 5
                        odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + kullaniciFiyat;
                    }

                    if (item.IsletmeSayisi > 1) {
                        isletmeFiyat = isletmeFiyat * item.IsletmeSayisi - isletmeFiyat * 1;
                        odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + isletmeFiyat;
                    }

                    $.each(JData.IsletmeModul, function (key, itemss) {
                        if ((itemss.AnaKullaniciID == item.ID)) {
                            odenecekTutar = odenecekTutar + itemss.Fiyat * itemss.Number;
                        }
                    });

                    tablo += '<td>₺' + ((odenecekTutar * 1.18) / 100).toFixed(2) + '</td>';

                    tablo += '<td>';
                    tablo += '<select id="selectLicenseType' + item.ID + '">';

                    if (item.LisansTipi == "0") {
                        tablo += '<option selected value="0"> NEW  </option>';
                    }
                    else {
                        tablo += '<option  value="0"> NEW  </option>';
                    }
                    if (item.LisansTipi == "1") {
                        tablo += '<option selected value="1"> ONLINE  </option>';
                    }
                    else {
                        tablo += '<option  value="1"> ONLINE  </option>';
                    }
                    if (item.LisansTipi == "2") {
                        tablo += '<option selected value="2"> OFFLINE </option>';
                    }
                    else {
                        tablo += '<option value="2"> OFFLINE </option>';
                    }
                    if (item.LisansTipi == "3") {
                        tablo += '<option selected value="3"> DEMO </option>';
                    }
                    else {
                        tablo += '<option  value="3"> DEMO </option>';
                    }
                    if (item.LisansTipi == "4") {
                        tablo += '<option selected value="4"> BAYI </option>';
                    }
                    else {
                        tablo += '<option  value="4"> BAYI </option>';
                    }

                    tablo += '</select>';
                    tablo += '</td>';

                    var start = new Date(parseInt(item.LisansBaslangicTarihi.substr(6)));
                    var finish = new Date(parseInt(item.LisansBitisTarihi.substr(6)));
                    var startDate = dateFormat(start);
                    var finishDate = dateFormat(finish);

                    tablo += '<td><input id="txtStartDate' + item.ID + '" value="' + startDate + '" class="form-control" type="date"></td>';
                    tablo += '<td><input id="txtFinishDate' + item.ID + '" value="' + finishDate + '" class="form-control" type="date"></td>';
                    tablo += '<td><input type="text" id="userCount' + item.ID + '" class="form-control" value="' + item.KullaniciSayisi + '"></td>';
                    tablo += '<td><input type="text" id="bussCount' + item.ID + '" class="form-control" value="' + item.IsletmeSayisi + '"></td>';

                    tablo += '<td>';
                    tablo += '<select id="selectIsletme' + item.ID + '" style="width:60px;" onchange="SelectIsletmeChange(' + item.ID + ');">';


                    tablo += '<option value="0">Tümü </option>';

                    tablo += isletmeler;

                    tablo += '</select>';
                    tablo += '</td>';

                    tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap="">';
                    tablo += '<a href="javascript:updateCustomers(' + item.ID + ');" id="userUpdate' + item.ID + '" dat-userid="' + item.ID + '" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">GÜNCELLE</a>';
                    tablo += '</td>';
                    tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap="">';
                    tablo += '<a href="/Detail/Index?LID=' + item.ID + '" class="btn btn-sm btn-success">DETAY</a>';
                    tablo += '</td>';
                    tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap="">';
                    tablo += '<a href="javascript:AdNoteCustomers(' + item.ID + ');" class="btn btn-sm btn-success">NOT</a>';
                    tablo += '</td>';
                    tablo += '<td class="with-btn" nowrap=""><a href="javascript:deleteCustumers(\'' + item.ID + '\',\'' + item.Ad + " " + item.Soyad + '\');" id="userDelete' + item.ID + '" class="btn btn-sm btn-danger">SİL</a></td>';
                    tablo += '</tr>';
                }
            });
        }

        $('#_mainUser').html( tablo);
        $('#_mainUser').simpleLoadMore({
            item: '.ecommerce-card',
            count: 12,
            counterInBtn: true,
            btnText: 'Daha Fazla {showing}/{total}',
        });
    });

    <script>

        $('#inlineCssCheckbox1').click(function () {
            if ($(this).prop("checked") == true) {
                $('input[type=search]').keyboard(
                    {
                        beforeVisible: function (e, keyboard, el) {
                            keyboard.el.blur();
                        },
                        layout: 'qwerty',
                        css:
                        {
                            // input & preview
                            input: 'form-control',
                            // keyboard container
                            container: 'center-block dropdown-menu', // jumbotron
                            // default state
                            buttonDefault: 'btn btn-default',
                            // hovered button
                            buttonHover: 'btn-primary',
                            // Action keys (e.g. Accept, Cancel, Tab, etc);
                            // this replaces "actionClass" option
                            buttonAction: 'active',
                            // used when disabling the decimal button {dec}
                            // when a decimal exists in the input area
                            buttonDisabled: 'disabled'
                        },
                        usePreview: false
                    }

                );

                $('input[type=text]').keyboard(
                    {
                        beforeVisible: function (e, keyboard, el) {
                            keyboard.el.blur();
                        },
                        layout: 'qwerty',
                        css:
                        {
                            // input & preview
                            input: 'form-control',
                            // keyboard container
                            container: 'center-block dropdown-menu', // jumbotron
                            // default state
                            buttonDefault: 'btn btn-default',
                            // hovered button
                            buttonHover: 'btn-primary',
                            // Action keys (e.g. Accept, Cancel, Tab, etc);
                            // this replaces "actionClass" option
                            buttonAction: 'active',
                            // used when disabling the decimal button {dec}
                            // when a decimal exists in the input area
                            buttonDisabled: 'disabled'
                        },
                        usePreview: false
                    }

                );

            }
            else if ($(this).prop("checked") == false) {
                //$('input[type=text]').getkeyboard();

            }
        });


    </script>
